---
title: Proteomic Data Overview
subtitle: SpringBloom2021 - Genome-resolved Metaproteomic Dataset
date: 09.04.2025
author: Cyrill Hofer
output:
  rmdformats::readthedown:
    highlight: tango
    self_contained: true
    code_folding: hide
    thumbnails: true
    gallery: false
    fig_width: 15
    df_print: kable
    fig_caption: yes
    use_bookdown: true
    css: custom.css
---

# Data Preparation
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, paged.print=FALSE}
# Clear R's Brain
rm(list = ls())

# Set the working directory
setwd("/SynologyDrive/PhD/Projects/SpringBloom2021/DataAnalysis_SpringBloom2021/Supplementary/SpringBloom_Metaproteomics/ProteomicDataOverview/")

# Load the libraries
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(forcats)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)

# Load the color palette
source("ColorPalette.R")

# Load the data
dat <- read_csv(file = "Proteomic_Data_Overview.csv")

n_distinct(dat$Protein_ID)
min(dat$Peptide_Abundance)
min(dat$Protein_Abundance_IBAQ)
```

```{r}
# --------------------------------------------------
# SETTINGS
# --------------------------------------------------

base_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "plain"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "plain"),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )

# fixed phylum order
phylum_order <- c(
  "Actinomycetota",   "Bacteroidota",     "Pseudomonadota",
  "Verrucomicrobiota","Planctomycetota",  "Chloroflexota",
  "Bdellovibrionota", "Acidobacteriota",  "Armatimonadota",
  "Myxococcota",      "Nitrospirota",     "Thermoproteota",
  "Patescibacteria",  "Gemmatimonadota",  "Cyanobacteriota",
  "Deinococcota",     "Chlamydiota"
)

# safer color mapping
phylum_cols <- setNames(ColorPalette[seq_along(phylum_order)], phylum_order)

# --------------------------------------------------
# TOP 8 PHYLA
# choose by proteins, as in your previous logic
# excluding contaminants from ranking only
# --------------------------------------------------

Top8_Phyla <- dat %>%
  filter(Protein_Abundance_IBAQ > 0, Phylum != "Y-FGCZCont") %>%
  group_by(Phylum) %>%
  summarise(UniqueCount = n_distinct(Protein_ID), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(UniqueCount)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 8) %>%
  pull(Phylum)

ordered_phyla <- phylum_order[phylum_order %in% Top8_Phyla]

# final plotting order
plot_levels <- c(ordered_phyla, "Rest", "Contaminants")

fill_cols <- c(
  phylum_cols[ordered_phyla],
  Rest = "red",
  Contaminants = "grey70"
)

# --------------------------------------------------
# HELPER: collapse phyla into Top8 / Rest / Contaminants
# --------------------------------------------------

add_phylum_group <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      Phylum_Group = case_when(
        Phylum == "Y-FGCZCont" ~ "Contaminants",
        Phylum %in% ordered_phyla ~ Phylum,
        TRUE ~ "Rest"
      ),
      Phylum_Group = factor(Phylum_Group, levels = plot_levels),
      Date = factor(Date, levels = unique(Date))
    )
}

# ==================================================
# PEPTIDES: 2 x 2 MULTIPANEL
# ==================================================

pep_dat <- dat %>%
  filter(Peptide_Abundance > 0) %>%
  add_phylum_group()

# 1. peptide count
pep_count <- pep_dat %>%
  group_by(Date, Phylum_Group) %>%
  summarise(Value = n_distinct(Peptide_ID), .groups = "drop")

p_pep_1 <- ggplot(pep_count, aes(Date, Value, fill = Phylum_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 8), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))) +
  labs(y = "Peptides [n]", title = "A. Peptide count") +
  base_theme

# 2. peptide count proportion
pep_count_prop <- pep_count %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(Value = Value / sum(Value) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

p_pep_2 <- ggplot(pep_count_prop, aes(Date, Value, fill = Phylum_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(y = "Peptides [%]", title = "B. Peptide count proportion") +
  base_theme

# 3. peptide abundance
pep_abund <- pep_dat %>%
  group_by(Date, Phylum_Group) %>%
  summarise(Value = sum(Peptide_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p_pep_3 <- ggplot(pep_abund, aes(Date, Value, fill = Phylum_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 8), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))) +
  labs(y = "Peptide abundance", title = "C. Peptide abundance") +
  base_theme

# 4. peptide abundance proportion
pep_abund_prop <- pep_abund %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(Value = Value / sum(Value) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

p_pep_4 <- ggplot(pep_abund_prop, aes(Date, Value, fill = Phylum_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(y = "Peptide abundance [%]", title = "D. Peptide abundance proportion") +
  base_theme

Figure_Peptides_Taxonomy <- (p_pep_1 + p_pep_2) / (p_pep_3 + p_pep_4) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "right")

Figure_Peptides_Taxonomy

# ==================================================
# PROTEINS: 2 x 2 MULTIPANEL
# ==================================================

prot_dat <- dat %>%
  filter(Protein_Abundance_IBAQ > 0) %>%
  add_phylum_group()

# 1. protein count
prot_count <- prot_dat %>%
  group_by(Date, Phylum_Group) %>%
  summarise(Value = n_distinct(Protein_ID), .groups = "drop")

p_prot_1 <- ggplot(prot_count, aes(Date, Value, fill = Phylum_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 8), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))) +
  labs(y = "Proteins [n]", title = "A. Protein count") +
  base_theme

# 2. protein count proportion
prot_count_prop <- prot_count %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(Value = Value / sum(Value) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

p_prot_2 <- ggplot(prot_count_prop, aes(Date, Value, fill = Phylum_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(y = "Proteins [%]", title = "B. Protein count proportion") +
  base_theme

# 3. protein abundance
prot_abund <- prot_dat %>%
  group_by(Date, Phylum_Group) %>%
  summarise(Value = sum(Protein_Abundance_IBAQ, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p_prot_3 <- ggplot(prot_abund, aes(Date, Value, fill = Phylum_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 8), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))) +
  labs(y = "Protein abundance [IBAQ]", title = "C. Protein abundance") +
  base_theme

# 4. protein abundance proportion
prot_abund_prop <- prot_abund %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(Value = Value / sum(Value) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

p_prot_4 <- ggplot(prot_abund_prop, aes(Date, Value, fill = Phylum_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(y = "Protein abundance [%]", title = "D. Protein abundance proportion") +
  base_theme

Figure_Proteins_Taxonomy <- (p_prot_1 + p_prot_2) / (p_prot_3 + p_prot_4) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "right")

Figure_Proteins_Taxonomy

ggsave(
  filename = "Figure_Peptides_Taxonomy_2x2.png",
  plot = Figure_Peptides_Taxonomy,
  width = 30,
  height = 18,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = "Figure_Proteins_Taxonomy_2x2.png",
  plot = Figure_Proteins_Taxonomy,
  width = 30,
  height = 18,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 300
)

```
```{r}
# ==================================================
# PHYLUM-RESOLVED TAXONOMY OVERVIEW: 4 x 2 MULTIPANEL
# column 1 = absolute values
# column 2 = proportions
# row 1 = a (peptide count)
# row 2 = b (peptide abundance)
# row 3 = c (protein count)
# row 4 = d (protein abundance)
# one global legend on top
# x-axis labels only on bottom row
# ==================================================

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)

# --------------------------------------------------
# SETTINGS
# --------------------------------------------------

base_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "plain"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "plain"),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )

theme_no_x <- theme(
  axis.title.x = element_blank(),
  axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
)

theme_bottom_x <- theme(
  axis.title.x = element_blank(),
  axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 10)
)

# fixed phylum order
phylum_order <- c(
  "Actinomycetota",   "Bacteroidota",     "Pseudomonadota",
  "Verrucomicrobiota","Planctomycetota",  "Chloroflexota",
  "Bdellovibrionota", "Acidobacteriota",  "Armatimonadota",
  "Myxococcota",      "Nitrospirota",     "Thermoproteota",
  "Patescibacteria",  "Gemmatimonadota",  "Cyanobacteriota",
  "Deinococcota",     "Chlamydiota"
)

# safer color mapping
phylum_cols <- setNames(ColorPalette[seq_along(phylum_order)], phylum_order)

# --------------------------------------------------
# TOP 8 PHYLA
# choose by proteins, excluding contaminants from ranking only
# --------------------------------------------------

Top8_Phyla <- dat %>%
  filter(Protein_Abundance_IBAQ > 0, Phylum != "Y-FGCZCont") %>%
  group_by(Phylum) %>%
  summarise(UniqueCount = n_distinct(Protein_ID), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(UniqueCount)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 8) %>%
  pull(Phylum)

ordered_phyla <- phylum_order[phylum_order %in% Top8_Phyla]

# final plotting order
plot_levels <- c(ordered_phyla, "Rest", "Contaminants")

fill_cols <- c(
  phylum_cols[ordered_phyla],
  Rest = "red",
  Contaminants = "grey70"
)

# --------------------------------------------------
# HELPER: collapse phyla into Top8 / Rest / Contaminants
# --------------------------------------------------

add_phylum_group <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      Phylum_Group = case_when(
        Phylum == "Y-FGCZCont" ~ "Contaminants",
        Phylum %in% ordered_phyla ~ Phylum,
        TRUE ~ "Rest"
      ),
      Phylum_Group = factor(Phylum_Group, levels = plot_levels),
      Date = factor(Date, levels = unique(Date))
    )
}

# ==================================================
# PEPTIDES
# ==================================================

pep_dat <- dat %>%
  filter(Peptide_Abundance > 0) %>%
  add_phylum_group()

# row a: peptide count
pep_count <- pep_dat %>%
  group_by(Date, Phylum_Group) %>%
  summarise(Value = n_distinct(Peptide_ID), .groups = "drop")

p_pep_1 <- ggplot(pep_count, aes(Date, Value, fill = Phylum_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 8),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  labs(y = "Peptides [n]", title = "a") +
  base_theme +
  theme_no_x

pep_count_prop <- pep_count %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(Value = Value / sum(Value) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

p_pep_2 <- ggplot(pep_count_prop, aes(Date, Value, fill = Phylum_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(y = "Peptides [%]", title = "") +
  base_theme +
  theme_no_x

# row b: peptide abundance
pep_abund <- pep_dat %>%
  group_by(Date, Phylum_Group) %>%
  summarise(Value = sum(Peptide_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p_pep_3 <- ggplot(pep_abund, aes(Date, Value, fill = Phylum_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 8),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  labs(y = "Peptide abundance", title = "b") +
  base_theme +
  theme_no_x

pep_abund_prop <- pep_abund %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(Value = Value / sum(Value) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

p_pep_4 <- ggplot(pep_abund_prop, aes(Date, Value, fill = Phylum_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(y = "Peptide abundance [%]", title = "") +
  base_theme +
  theme_no_x

# ==================================================
# PROTEINS
# ==================================================

prot_dat <- dat %>%
  filter(Protein_Abundance_IBAQ > 0) %>%
  add_phylum_group()

# row c: protein count
prot_count <- prot_dat %>%
  group_by(Date, Phylum_Group) %>%
  summarise(Value = n_distinct(Protein_ID), .groups = "drop")

p_prot_1 <- ggplot(prot_count, aes(Date, Value, fill = Phylum_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 8),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  labs(y = "Proteins [n]", title = "c") +
  base_theme +
  theme_no_x

prot_count_prop <- prot_count %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(Value = Value / sum(Value) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

p_prot_2 <- ggplot(prot_count_prop, aes(Date, Value, fill = Phylum_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(y = "Proteins [%]", title = "") +
  base_theme +
  theme_no_x

# row d: protein abundance
prot_abund <- prot_dat %>%
  group_by(Date, Phylum_Group) %>%
  summarise(Value = sum(Protein_Abundance_IBAQ, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p_prot_3 <- ggplot(prot_abund, aes(Date, Value, fill = Phylum_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 8),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  labs(y = "Protein abundance [IBAQ]", title = "d") +
  base_theme +
  theme_bottom_x

prot_abund_prop <- prot_abund %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(Value = Value / sum(Value) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

p_prot_4 <- ggplot(prot_abund_prop, aes(Date, Value, fill = Phylum_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(y = "Protein abundance [%]", title = "") +
  base_theme +
  theme_bottom_x

# ==================================================
# COMBINED 4 x 2 FIGURE
# ==================================================

Figure_Taxonomy_Combined <-
  (p_pep_1 | p_pep_2) /
  (p_pep_3 | p_pep_4) /
  (p_prot_1 | p_prot_2) /
  (p_prot_3 | p_prot_4) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.justification = "center"
  )

Figure_Taxonomy_Combined

# ==================================================
# SAVE
# ==================================================

ggsave(
  filename = "Figure_Taxonomy_Combined_4x2.png",
  plot = Figure_Taxonomy_Combined,
  width = 30,
  height = 36,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 300
)
```


```{r}
# ==================================================
# REPLICATE STATUS: 2 x 2 MULTIPANEL
# One Replicate vs Both Replicates
# ==================================================

# Common settings
rep_fill_cols <- c(
  "One Replicate"  = ColorPalette[4],
  "Both Replicates" = ColorPalette[2]
)

# ---------------------------
# helper
# ---------------------------

add_replicate_group <- function(df, presence_col) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      Replicate_Group = case_when(
        .data[[presence_col]] == "one"  ~ "One Replicate",
        .data[[presence_col]] == "both" ~ "Both Replicates",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      Replicate_Group = factor(
        Replicate_Group,
        levels = c("One Replicate", "Both Replicates")
      ),
      Date = factor(Date, levels = unique(Date))
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Replicate_Group))
}

# ==================================================
# PEPTIDES: 2 x 2 MULTIPANEL
# ==================================================

pep_rep_dat <- dat %>%
  filter(Peptide_Abundance > 0) %>%
  add_replicate_group("Peptide_Presence")

# 1. peptide count
pep_rep_count <- pep_rep_dat %>%
  group_by(Date, Replicate_Group) %>%
  summarise(Value = n_distinct(Peptide_ID), .groups = "drop")

p_pep_rep_1 <- ggplot(pep_rep_count, aes(Date, Value, fill = Replicate_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rep_fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 8),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  labs(y = "Peptides [n]", title = "A. Peptide count") +
  base_theme

# 2. peptide count proportion
pep_rep_count_prop <- pep_rep_count %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(Value = Value / sum(Value) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

p_pep_rep_2 <- ggplot(pep_rep_count_prop, aes(Date, Value, fill = Replicate_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rep_fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(y = "Peptides [%]", title = "B. Peptide count proportion") +
  base_theme

# 3. peptide abundance
pep_rep_abund <- pep_rep_dat %>%
  group_by(Date, Replicate_Group) %>%
  summarise(Value = sum(Peptide_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p_pep_rep_3 <- ggplot(pep_rep_abund, aes(Date, Value, fill = Replicate_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rep_fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 8),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  labs(y = "Peptide abundance", title = "C. Peptide abundance") +
  base_theme

# 4. peptide abundance proportion
pep_rep_abund_prop <- pep_rep_abund %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(Value = Value / sum(Value) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

p_pep_rep_4 <- ggplot(pep_rep_abund_prop, aes(Date, Value, fill = Replicate_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rep_fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(y = "Peptide abundance [%]", title = "D. Peptide abundance proportion") +
  base_theme

Figure_Peptides_Replicates_2x2 <- (p_pep_rep_1 + p_pep_rep_2) / (p_pep_rep_3 + p_pep_rep_4) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "right")

Figure_Peptides_Replicates_2x2

# ==================================================
# PROTEINS: 2 x 2 MULTIPANEL
# ==================================================

prot_rep_dat <- dat %>%
  filter(Protein_Abundance_IBAQ > 0) %>%
  add_replicate_group("Protein_Presence")

# 1. protein count
prot_rep_count <- prot_rep_dat %>%
  group_by(Date, Replicate_Group) %>%
  summarise(Value = n_distinct(Protein_ID), .groups = "drop")

p_prot_rep_1 <- ggplot(prot_rep_count, aes(Date, Value, fill = Replicate_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rep_fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 8),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  labs(y = "Proteins [n]", title = "A. Protein count") +
  base_theme

# 2. protein count proportion
prot_rep_count_prop <- prot_rep_count %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(Value = Value / sum(Value) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

p_prot_rep_2 <- ggplot(prot_rep_count_prop, aes(Date, Value, fill = Replicate_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rep_fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(y = "Proteins [%]", title = "B. Protein count proportion") +
  base_theme

# 3. protein abundance
prot_rep_abund <- prot_rep_dat %>%
  group_by(Date, Replicate_Group) %>%
  summarise(Value = sum(Protein_Abundance_IBAQ, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p_prot_rep_3 <- ggplot(prot_rep_abund, aes(Date, Value, fill = Replicate_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rep_fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 8),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  labs(y = "Protein abundance [IBAQ]", title = "C. Protein abundance") +
  base_theme

# 4. protein abundance proportion
prot_rep_abund_prop <- prot_rep_abund %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(Value = Value / sum(Value) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

p_prot_rep_4 <- ggplot(prot_rep_abund_prop, aes(Date, Value, fill = Replicate_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rep_fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(y = "Protein abundance [%]", title = "D. Protein abundance proportion") +
  base_theme

Figure_Proteins_Replicates_2x2 <- (p_prot_rep_1 + p_prot_rep_2) / (p_prot_rep_3 + p_prot_rep_4) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "right")

Figure_Proteins_Replicates_2x2

# ==================================================
# SAVE
# ==================================================

ggsave(
  filename = "Figure_Peptides_Replicates_2x2.png",
  plot = Figure_Peptides_Replicates_2x2,
  width = 30,
  height = 18,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = "Figure_Proteins_Replicates_2x2.png",
  plot = Figure_Proteins_Replicates_2x2,
  width = 30,
  height = 18,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 300
)
```
```{r}
# ==================================================
# REPLICATE STATUS: 4 x 2 MULTIPANEL
# column 1 = absolute values
# column 2 = proportions
# row 1 = a (peptide count)
# row 2 = b (peptide abundance)
# row 3 = c (protein count)
# row 4 = d (protein abundance)
# one global legend on top
# x-axis labels only on bottom row
# ==================================================

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)

# ==================================================
# COMMON SETTINGS
# ==================================================

rep_fill_cols <- c(
  "One Replicate"   = ColorPalette[4],
  "Both Replicates" = ColorPalette[2]
)

# ---------------------------
# helper
# ---------------------------

add_replicate_group <- function(df, presence_col) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      Replicate_Group = case_when(
        .data[[presence_col]] == "one"  ~ "One Replicate",
        .data[[presence_col]] == "both" ~ "Both Replicates",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      Replicate_Group = factor(
        Replicate_Group,
        levels = c("One Replicate", "Both Replicates")
      ),
      Date = factor(Date, levels = unique(Date))
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Replicate_Group))
}

theme_no_x <- theme(
  axis.title.x = element_blank(),
  axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
)

theme_bottom_x <- theme(
  axis.title.x = element_blank(),
  axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1)
)

# ==================================================
# PEPTIDES
# ==================================================

pep_rep_dat <- dat %>%
  filter(Peptide_Abundance > 0) %>%
  add_replicate_group("Peptide_Presence")

# peptide count
pep_rep_count <- pep_rep_dat %>%
  group_by(Date, Replicate_Group) %>%
  summarise(Value = n_distinct(Peptide_ID), .groups = "drop")

p_pep_rep_1 <- ggplot(pep_rep_count, aes(Date, Value, fill = Replicate_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rep_fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 8),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  labs(y = "Peptides [n]", title = "a") +
  base_theme +
  theme_no_x

pep_rep_count_prop <- pep_rep_count %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(Value = Value / sum(Value) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

p_pep_rep_2 <- ggplot(pep_rep_count_prop, aes(Date, Value, fill = Replicate_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rep_fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(y = "Peptides [%]", title = "") +
  base_theme +
  theme_no_x

# peptide abundance
pep_rep_abund <- pep_rep_dat %>%
  group_by(Date, Replicate_Group) %>%
  summarise(Value = sum(Peptide_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p_pep_rep_3 <- ggplot(pep_rep_abund, aes(Date, Value, fill = Replicate_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rep_fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 8),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  labs(y = "Peptide abundance", title = "b") +
  base_theme +
  theme_no_x

pep_rep_abund_prop <- pep_rep_abund %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(Value = Value / sum(Value) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

p_pep_rep_4 <- ggplot(pep_rep_abund_prop, aes(Date, Value, fill = Replicate_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rep_fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(y = "Peptide abundance [%]", title = "") +
  base_theme +
  theme_no_x

# ==================================================
# PROTEINS
# ==================================================

prot_rep_dat <- dat %>%
  filter(Protein_Abundance_IBAQ > 0) %>%
  add_replicate_group("Protein_Presence")

# protein count
prot_rep_count <- prot_rep_dat %>%
  group_by(Date, Replicate_Group) %>%
  summarise(Value = n_distinct(Protein_ID), .groups = "drop")

p_prot_rep_1 <- ggplot(prot_rep_count, aes(Date, Value, fill = Replicate_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rep_fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 8),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  labs(y = "Proteins [n]", title = "c") +
  base_theme +
  theme_no_x

prot_rep_count_prop <- prot_rep_count %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(Value = Value / sum(Value) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

p_prot_rep_2 <- ggplot(prot_rep_count_prop, aes(Date, Value, fill = Replicate_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rep_fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(y = "Proteins [%]", title = "") +
  base_theme +
  theme_no_x

# protein abundance
prot_rep_abund <- prot_rep_dat %>%
  group_by(Date, Replicate_Group) %>%
  summarise(Value = sum(Protein_Abundance_IBAQ, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p_prot_rep_3 <- ggplot(prot_rep_abund, aes(Date, Value, fill = Replicate_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rep_fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 8),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  labs(y = "Protein abundance [IBAQ]", title = "d") +
  base_theme +
  theme_bottom_x

prot_rep_abund_prop <- prot_rep_abund %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(Value = Value / sum(Value) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

p_prot_rep_4 <- ggplot(prot_rep_abund_prop, aes(Date, Value, fill = Replicate_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = ColorPalette[16], linewidth = 0.05) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rep_fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(y = "Protein abundance [%]", title = "") +
  base_theme +
  theme_bottom_x

# ==================================================
# COMBINED 4 x 2 FIGURE
# ==================================================

Figure_Replicates_Combined <-
  (p_pep_rep_1 | p_pep_rep_2) /
  (p_pep_rep_3 | p_pep_rep_4) /
  (p_prot_rep_1 | p_prot_rep_2) /
  (p_prot_rep_3 | p_prot_rep_4) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.justification = "center"
  )

Figure_Replicates_Combined

# ==================================================
# SAVE
# ==================================================

ggsave(
  filename = "Figure_Replicates_Combined_4x2.png",
  plot = Figure_Replicates_Combined,
  width = 30,
  height = 36,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 300
)
```




# Number of peptides per protein ?
```{r}
# Prepare the plotting data for Number of Peptides per Protein
plot_dat <- dat %>%
  filter(Protein_Abundance_IBAQ > 0) %>% 
   mutate(Overall_Unique_Proteins_Detected = n_distinct(Protein_ID)) %>%
  select(Nr_Peptides, Protein_ID, Overall_Unique_Proteins_Detected) %>%
  distinct()

# Create the histogram plot
Plot_Number_Of_Peptides_Per_Protein <- ggplot(plot_dat, aes(x = factor(Nr_Peptides))) +
  geom_bar(fill = ColorPalette[2], color = "black") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 8000), breaks = seq(0, 8000, by = 1000)) +
  labs(y = "Proteins [n]", x = "Peptides [n]", title = "Distribution of Number of Peptides per Protein", subtitle = paste("Total Unique Proteins Detected:", unique(plot_dat$Overall_Unique_Proteins_Detected)), x = "Number of Peptides", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
        plot.title  = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"))


# display the plots
Plot_Number_Of_Peptides_Per_Protein

ggsave(
  filename = "Figure_PeptidesPerProtein.png",
  plot = Plot_Number_Of_Peptides_Per_Protein,
  width = 12,
  height = 9,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)
```
